title: Hakea georgeana
taxonomy: Hakea georgeana is a species of flowering plant in the family Proteaceae. It is native to Australia and is part of the large and diverse genus Hakea. The genus Hakea itself belongs to the order Proteales, which is a group of flowering plants that also includes the family Stemonuraceae. The class to which Hakea georgeana belongs is Magnoliopsida, which includes many flowering plants. This classification is part of the broader system of plant taxonomy.
